headline: GS flags inflation threat as oil risks rise with Iran war
summary: Investing.com -- The conflict involving Iran continues to pressure global oil markets, prompting Goldman Sachs to warn in a note Tuesday that the United States faces a renewed inflation threat driven largely by energy prices.
